creator: void@f-m.fm
text:
(In reply to Rodrigo Osorio from comment #2)

On an arm64 system (this one is raspberry pi 4) with poudriere already installed and configured, install ports-mgmt/pkg-provides via any method (ports, pkg builder or poudriere.

Ensure the following is uncommented in /usr/local/etc/pkg.conf as instructed to when installing the pkg-provides port :

PKG_PLUGINS_DIR = "/usr/local/lib/pkg/";
PKG_ENABLE_PLUGINS = true;
PLUGINS [ provides ];

Then run 
poudriere options -j jailname category/port. 

In the following example, the jailname is rpi4 and the port is mail/exim. Here is the output in its entirety (options have already been set, so we're not getting the blue options screen, what should happen is that the root prompt should return without the error preceding it):

# poudriere options -j rpi4 mail/exim
[00:00:00] Working on options directory: /usr/local/etc/poudriere.d/rpi4-options
[00:00:00] Using ports from: /usr/local/poudriere/ports/default
[00:00:00] Appending to make.conf: /usr/local/etc/poudriere.d/rpi4-make.conf
ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/lib/pkg//provides.so: Undefined symbol "pkg_plugin_set"
make: "/usr/local/poudriere/ports/default/Mk/bsd.port.mk" line 1222: warning: "/usr/local/sbin/pkg-static version -t 1.19.0 1.17.0" returned non-zero status
ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/lib/pkg//provides.so: Undefined symbol "pkg_plugin_set"
make: "/usr/local/poudriere/ports/default/Mk/bsd.port.mk" line 1229: warning: "/usr/local/sbin/pkg-static version -t 1.19.0 1.17.2" returned non-zero status
[00:00:00] Re-run 'poudriere options' with the -c flag to modify the options.
ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/lib/pkg//provides.so: Undefined symbol "pkg_plugin_set"
make: "/usr/local/poudriere/ports/default/Mk/bsd.port.mk" line 1222: warning: "/usr/local/sbin/pkg-static version -t 1.19.0 1.17.0" returned non-zero status
ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/lib/pkg//provides.so: Undefined symbol "pkg_plugin_set"
make: "/usr/local/poudriere/ports/default/Mk/bsd.port.mk" line 1229: warning: "/usr/local/sbin/pkg-static version -t 1.19.0 1.17.2" returned non-zero status
===> Setting user-specified options for exim-4.95_6 and dependencies
#
